title: Sunrun Inc (RUN) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Cash Generation and Storage Growth
text: Sunrun demonstrated strong momentum in Q4 2024, achieving positive cash generation for three consecutive quarters with $34 million generated in the quarter. Annual recurring revenue (ARR) reached over $1.6 billion, up 23% year-over-year, reflecting solid business growth. The storage business showed exceptional growth with storage attachment rate reaching 62% of new installations, up from prior year. The company deployed 392 megawatt hours in Q4, representing substantial year-over-year expansion. Sunrun added approximately 32,900 customers in Q4, including 30,700 subscriber additions with Net Subscriber Value reaching $19,177 per customer. The company deployed roughly 242 megawatts of solar capacity, marking a 7% year-over-year increase. Sunrun paid down $186 million in parent debt since Q1 2024, while gross earning assets reached $17.8 billion. Management provided guidance expecting cash generation of $200 million to $500 million for full year 2025, though executives acknowledge headwinds including slower domestic content qualifications and competitive pricing pressures in certain market segments.
